title: scoliosorus mannianus
intro: Scoliosorus mannianus is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the fern family, specifically the genus Scoliosorus. This plant is native to the Himalayan region and is also known as Himalayan Scoliosorus. The medicinal properties of Scoliosorus mannianus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, burns, and skin infections. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and improve overall skin health, which can be achieved through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments.
